title: Slavic Delight
description: Addon to the Farmer's Delight mod that adds dishes of Slovenian cuisine
body:
![slavic-delight-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32cc176181d61c3d6c5a3b1b30432b19ed2a3035.png)

This is an addon to the popular Farmer's Delight mod. Slavic Delight adds many dishes and ingredients of Slavic cuisine to minecraft.

Slavic Delight also adds a new mechanic for creating drinks and some other items to the game, this is brewing (fermentation)

![slavic delight creative tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312a46bf8627dee3faea9524b46facb55b0c3946.png)
